race.description: All The Best Joel Roberts (C1) Handicap
race.comment: KIRKALL (3) is a handy gelding rewarded for his consistency with a tough win over 1400m at Tamworth from the sticky gate. Can go on with it from the good gate and shapes as a genuine winning chance. Those chances have only been strengthened by scratchings this morning. MELATEN (5) sent straight to the front at his fourth run back with a slick on-pace victory over today's course and distance. Hard to beat again in this suitable race. DECADAD (1) returned for his second campaign with a commanding Maiden victory over 1150m at Gold Coast Poly. Harder task this time but expected to measure up. FALL FOR AUTUMN (2) is drawn the outside but has good early speed and fitter again, capable of a solid race.
